generate.title: Generate
generate.subtitle: Select a voice, enter text, and generate speech.
generate.noGenerations: No generations yet. Generate some audio above!

voice.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
voice.name: Name
voice.audioSamplesHint: Add short audio clips of the voice you want to clone. The model will use these samples as a reference to reproduce the voice. Drag to reorder, toggle to include or exclude a sample.
voice.importDescription: Import a voice from a .zip archive previously exported from Sirene.
voice.emptyNoModel: You need to install a TTS model before you can add a voice.
voice.needModelHint: Install a TTS model first from the Models page
voice.needInstructHint: Install a model with instruct support from the Models page

voiceDesigner.title: Voice Designer
voiceDesigner.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the voice you want to create. E.g. 'A warm, deep male voice with a slight British accent, calm and reassuring tone.'
voiceDesigner.sampleTextPlaceholder: Enter the text you want the voice to speak for the preview.

model.title: Models
model.subtitle: Install and manage models. Models are downloaded on demand.
model.importPiperDescription: Import a custom Piper ONNX model with its config file.

history.title: History
history.subtitle: Browse all past generations.
history.empty: No generations yet. Head to the Generate page to create your first one.
history.deleteAllDescription: {{count}} generation(s) for voice "{{voice}}" will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage API keys and configuration.
settings.apiKeysDescription: Configure API keys for cloud-based services. Keys are stored securely and never displayed in full after saving.

deleteGeneration.title: Delete generation?
deleteGeneration.description: This action cannot be undone. The audio file will be permanently deleted.

auth.name: Name
auth.welcomeSubtitle: Sign in to your account to continue
auth.createAccountSubtitle: Get started with your own voice workspace
auth.heroSubtitle: Create, clone, and manage AI voices with an open-source TTS platform.
auth.feature1: Multi-engine TTS with Kokoro, F5, Piper, ElevenLabs and more
